dataModel.layoutModel: deterministic-network-orbit; not a tree/column pipeline layout
dataModel.selectionModel: single full network graph rendered once; selected subgraph, viewpoint trees, nodes, and edges are highlighted in-place

interactionModel.requestPanel: the current user-confirmed request, task type, target, and boundary are visible before interaction
interactionModel.minimalDefaultSurface: the left rail shows only Current Request, Needed Viewpoints, and Inspect actions; detailed Project Memory, SubGraph, Instruction Source, node, edge, and tree data is shown only after click
interactionModel.projectMemoryPanel: optional Project Memory context is available through an Inspect action and shows mode, direction, portfolio role, detailed slice, taxonomy profile, and preview-only authority without changing graph selection
interactionModel.workflowStepper: a linked-list style 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4 -> 5 -> 6 stepper replays the current request flow from source record, through viewpoint trees, to selected subgraph and final instruction-pack preview; each step changes graph highlight and inspector detail only
interactionModel.workHistoryNavigation: top-level previous/next buttons plus a 1-based index input navigate graph-source retrofit records only; selecting a prior record highlights its graph record node and connected context
interactionModel.selectedViewpointTreePanel: the trees selected by the current request are shown as compact viewpoint buttons; node and edge chips are deferred to the click inspector
interactionModel.panZoom: mouse drag pans the graph; mouse wheel zooms around the pointer; +/-/R buttons provide bounded semantic zoom where node boxes, labels, and edge strokes keep stable screen size
interactionModel.nodeClick: show node kind, state, intent claim, record path, code locations, pack role, tree membership, subgraph membership, selection banner, and visible selected-node stroke
interactionModel.edgeClick: show from/to node ids, edge kind, edgeIntent classification, claim, confidence, tree membership, subgraph membership, selection banner, and visible selected-edge stroke
interactionModel.treeClick: highlight all nodes and edges in that viewpoint tree and show clickable node/edge chips plus viewpoint summary
interactionModel.subgraphClick: highlight selected task subgraph and show task type, start node, selected node/edge chips, required viewpoint tree breakdown, allowed files, forbidden flows, and verification requirements

nonExecutionBoundary: DevViewGraph is a read-only visualization/report artifact. It does not execute Codex, call an LLM, mutate graph-source, apply graph deltas, approve work, record human decisions, satisfy runtime Evidence, prove equivalence, enforce scope, configure CI, or replace user review.
